/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/e1ap_cu_cp_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/e1ap_cu_cp_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/bearer_context_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/bearer_context_release_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/bearer_context_modification_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/cu_cp_e1_reset_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/e1_release_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/procedures/e1ap_stop_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.dir/ue_context/e1ap_cu_cp_ue_context.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_e1ap_cu_cp.a
